app_identity.archetype: Archetype 3 (Pastel & Soft) infused with Neo-Brutalist utility (Tactile, sharp contrasts)
app_identity.mood: Playful, highly tactile, functional, reducing the 'boring math' anxiety of standard utilities.

rules.h1_numbers: Massive scale (e.g., 48px to 64px), tracking-tighter, font-black. Used for conversion inputs/outputs.
rules.h2_headers: 30px, tracking-tight, font-bold. Used for category titles.
rules.labels: 14px, tracking-[0.1em], uppercase, font-bold. Used for 'From' / 'To' / Dropdowns.

spacing_and_layout.touch_targets: Minimum 48x48px for all interactive elements to ensure mobile accessibility.

home_screen.card_style_light: Neo-brutalist: 2px solid #0A0A0A border, 4px solid #0A0A0A drop shadow. Aspect ratio 1:1. Icon top-left, Text bottom-left.
home_screen.card_style_dark: Flat: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1) border, no drop shadow. Text color inverted to white/light gray for readability.
home_screen.ad_banner: Fixed at bottom, 50px height. Placeholder UI: Gray block with 'AdMob Banner' text.

converter_screen.layout: Vertical split flow taking up full available height minus header and ad banner.
converter_screen.header: Dynamic background color matching the selected category. Contains Back button and Category Name.
converter_screen.inputs: Massive borderless numeric inputs. Center aligned. Do NOT use default text input borders.
converter_screen.dropdowns: Pill-shaped selectors placed directly above or below the numeric inputs.
converter_screen.swap_button: Circular Floating Action Button (FAB) perfectly overlapping the seam between the 'From' and 'To' zones. Prominent drop shadow.

settings_screen.remove_ads_cta: Massive, screen-wide button. Uses a Sunset Gradient (Orange #F97316 to Pink #EC4899). Bold white text 'Remove Ads - ₹99'. (No purple/teal defaults).

motion_and_interactions.card_press: Scale down to 0.95 opacity 0.8 on active press.
motion_and_interactions.swap_animation: Rotate 180 degrees with spring physics when tapped (if using Reanimated).
motion_and_interactions.page_transition: Standard React Navigation Native slide transitions.

accessibility.data_testids: MANDATORY on all touchables, text inputs, dropdowns, and text displays. Format: `kebab-case-role`.
accessibility.contrast: Ensure dark mode inverted colors meet 4.5:1 ratio.
accessibility.haptics: Trigger light haptic feedback (using expo-haptics) on every number input press, grid card press, and swap button press.

instructions_to_main_agent: This is a React Native Expo app. Use <View>, <Text>, <TouchableOpacity>, <TextInput>.
Use StyleSheet for styling. Do not use Tailwind/HTML classes unless NativeWind is installed. Translate the hex and pixel values provided here into standard RN styles.
Use 'lucide-react-native' for icons (ensure the package is added).
Use 'react-native-safe-area-context' to pad the top/bottom of screens.
Do NOT use 'Inter' or generic fonts. Try to load 'Outfit' and 'Manrope' via '@expo-google-fonts'. If unavailable, fallback to system sans-serif but maintain the massive font size scale.
AdMob integration is a placeholder. Just build the UI frame for it.
Ensure the 'Remove Ads' button avoids standard purple/teal colors as per E1 constraints.
